hospital_db.description: Primary patient records and clinical database. Compromise has life-safety implications.

domain_controller.description: Active Directory domain controller. Compromise yields full network lateral movement.

backup_server.description: Centralised backup storage. Ransomware targeting this eliminates recovery capability.

email_server.description: Organisation mail server. Compromise enables phishing, BEC, and data exfiltration.

employee_laptop.description: Standard end-user workstation. Limited blast radius; may serve as lateral movement pivot.

file_server.description: Shared file server hosting departmental documents and sensitive data.

vpn_gateway.description: Remote access VPN gateway. Compromise exposes full internal network perimeter.

web_server.description: Public-facing web application server. Breach may enable pivot to internal network.
